The Hook.effect: After each hand played, 2 random unplayed cards are discarded from hand.

The Ox.effect: Playing the most-played hand type this run sets money to $0.

The House.effect: The first drawn hand is all face-down.

The Wall.effect: Extra large blind: requires 4× base score. Luchador or Chicot can reduce it to 2×.

The Wheel.effect: Each drawn card has a 1 in 7 chance of being face-down.

The Arm.effect: Permanently reduces the level of the played hand type by 1 (minimum level 1). Applied before scoring.

The Club.effect: All Club cards are debuffed and cannot be scoring cards.

The Fish.effect: After each hand played, newly drawn cards are face-down.

The Psychic.effect: Must play exactly 5 cards each hand (not all need to score).

The Goad.effect: All Spade cards are debuffed and cannot be scoring cards.

The Window.effect: All Diamond cards are debuffed and cannot be scoring cards.

The Eye.effect: Each hand type can only be played once per blind.

The Mouth.effect: Can only play one hand type this blind. After the first hand, must repeat that same type.

The Plant.effect: All face cards (J, Q, K) are debuffed.

The Serpent.effect: After each play or discard, always draw exactly 3 cards regardless of hand size limit.

The Pillar.effect: Cards played during Small and Big blinds this Ante are debuffed.

The Needle.effect: Only 1 hand allowed per round. Discards are still available.

The Head.effect: All Heart cards are debuffed and cannot be scoring cards.

The Flint.effect: Base chips and mult of all hand types are halved this blind.

The Mark.effect: All face cards are drawn face-down.

Verdant Leaf.effect: All cards are debuffed until 1 Joker is sold.

Violet Vessel.effect: Extra large blind: requires 6× base score. Luchador or Chicot can reduce it to 2×.

Crimson Heart.effect: Each hand, one random Joker is debuffed. The debuffed Joker changes each hand.

Cerulean Bell.effect: One card is always forced into the selection.
